data.title: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez (AOC) Hits 1 Million Followers With Top Bluesky Account, Mark Cuban Gains Popularity, Jack Dorsey Notably Absent
data.description: Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez of New York recently became the first person on Bluesky whose account has surpassed the 1 million follower mark.

data.title: Rezolve AI To Gain From Strong Partnerships With Microsoft, Google, And Tether Wallet: Analyst
data.description: Roth MKM analyst initiates a Buy rating on Rezolve AI with a $4 target, citing strong partnerships with Microsoft, Google, and AI advancements.
